items.title: Inside Spotify’s Plot to Take Down Apple
items.description: The music service’s rebellion against an App Store ‘tax’ over the past decade has significantly weakened Apple’s grip on the mobile world

items.title: Dow Jones Futures: Market Wavers At Highs, Apple iPhone Event Due; Nvidia, Tesla, AppLovin, Robinhood In Focus
items.description: Dow Jones futures: The stock market had a mixed week but is right at highs. The Apple iPhone event looms. Nvidia, Tesla, AppLovin are in focus.

items.title: MNTN CEO on Apple Plans AI Search Tool for Siri
items.description: Mark Douglas, MNTN CEO, says Apple has little choice but to develop an AI-powered web search tool for Siri to rival OpenAI. He tells Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on "The Close" that Apple doesn't have a strong track record on execution.
